steps.t: The Peaceful Glade lies north of Egladil. Galhíril suggested you <rgb=#FF0000>meditate</rgb> in the Peaceful Glade.

Galhíril is in Egladil. You should return to Galhiril and tell her of your meditations within the circles of Lothlórien.
